name: Mi Yue

skills.name: Eternal Youth
skills.description: Summons a shadow servant that damages enemies and restores Health to her whenever using a skill. She also gains Shadow Power that boosts her Movement Speed and healing effects.

skills.name: Dark Transfer
skills.description: Unleashes shadow energy, dealing damage to enemies that come into contact with it. Upon using the skill again, will shift to the shadow's location, dealing damage again. A shadow servant will be summoned if she hits an enemy after shifting.

skills.name: Ravenous Tether
skills.description: Releases a tether that links to the first enemy hit. Damages and slows over time. Steals Physical and Magical Attack while recovering Health.

skills.name: Umbral Moon
skills.description: Removes debuffs, gains Movement Speed, and becomes untargetable. Deals damage to nearby enemies upon entering and exiting the untargetable state.

tips: Mi Yue is a Medium Mage (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 49.5% win rate and 0.7% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Giant's Grip → Boots of Resistance → Golden Blade → Blazing Cape → Blood Rage → Breakthrough Robe.
Run Fate for stats that match Mi Yue's Mage kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Dark Transfer → Ravenous Tether → Umbral Moon → reposition. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for maximum damage and passive value.
Laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
Teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
Mi Yue excels into Mai Shiranui, Wukong. Avoid blind picking into Cao Cao, Dharma, Dian Wei without team peel.

Mi Yue is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 49.5% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Ban rate 0.7% — expect Mi Yue to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role.

faqs.question: Is Mi Yue good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Mi Yue is Tier A Mage with 49.5% win rate, 0.7% pick rate, and 0.7% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Solid situational pick.

faqs.question: What is the best Mi Yue build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Giant's Grip, Boots of Resistance, Golden Blade, Blazing Cape, Blood Rage, Breakthrough Robe. Run Fate arcana with Smite. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Mi Yue?
faqs.answer: Pick Cao Cao, Dharma, Dian Wei into Mi Yue. Deny Clash Lane resources early and force fights before Mi Yue completes core items. Mi Yue struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Mi Yue counter?
faqs.answer: Mi Yue is strong into Mai Shiranui, Wukong according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Mi Yue when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Clash Lane lane.

faqs.question: Is Mi Yue good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Mi Yue is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 49.5% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Ban rate 0.7% — expect Mi Yue to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role.

faqs.question: What lane should Mi Yue play?
faqs.answer: Mi Yue is tagged Clash Lane in Camp export (Mage, Fighter). Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Mi Yue?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Fate arcana. Battle spell: Smite. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Mi Yue or Daji — which is better?
faqs.answer: Mi Yue vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Daji wins 1.5% more often globally. Choose Mi Yue when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Mi Yue?
faqs.answer: Yes in tryhard queues — 0.7% ban rate. Deny if enemy first-picks Mage.
